subcodes.first_line: O servant of Truth! The matter has gone beyond the point where We should sit and occupy Ourselves with proofs for the people of the Bayan and compose a treatise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندهء حقّ کار از آن گذشته که ما نشسته به استدلاليّه به جهت اهل بيان مشغول شويم و رساله‌ای تأليف نمائيم‌
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @growth of the Cause, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @service to others; to the Cause of God
